title: Discovery & Strategy
description: Align on the AI product, audience, and conversion goal so the landing page sells clearly.

sections.title: Inputs
steps: Collect product link, target audience, and primary CTA (demo, waitlist, trial).
List top competitors and what you want to differentiate.
Define success metric (signup rate, demo bookings, email capture).
Confirm tech constraints (Next.js/Vite, CMS, analytics, hosting).

sections.title: Messaging
sections.summary: Make the value obvious in seconds.
steps: Write a 1-line value prop and 2 supporting benefit bullets.
Add proof: testimonials, logos, metrics, or believable claims.
Define objection handling (security, accuracy, pricing, integration).
Map section order from most-to-least persuasive.

title: Design & Copy
description: High-end visuals and tight copy that match your AI product quality.

sections.title: Page Structure
steps: Hero: headline, subhead, CTA, and proof.
Features: 3-6 sections with scannable benefits.
Social proof: testimonials, logos, or usage stats.
Pricing/FAQ: reduce friction and answer objections.

sections.title: Visual Polish
sections.summary: Details that make it feel expensive.
steps: Design tokens: spacing, radius, shadows, and typography scale.
Micro-interactions: hover, tap, and scroll feel.
Illustration/visual system: gradients, ambient background, icons.
Mobile-first spacing and readability checks.

title: Build, QA & Launch
description: Implement fast, test across devices, and launch with confidence.

sections.title: Implementation
sections.summary: React + Tailwind build with clean components.
steps: Build reusable sections/components with consistent props.
Add motion that feels premium (not distracting).
Implement CTA tracking hooks (events) if needed.
Ensure forms have clear success/error states.

sections.title: QA & Launch
steps: Run Lighthouse and fix the biggest wins.
Keyboard navigation + focus states audit.
Cross-browser/device checks (mobile, tablet, desktop).
Deploy to Vercel/Netlify and verify analytics/events.
